Joule Business AI Solutions.name: Joule Business AI Solutions
Joule Business AI Solutions.tagline: Joule brings assistants and agents together in a unified workspace that turns intent into autonomous action—running end-to-end workflows across your business.
capabilities: Turn siloed work into connected, trusted workflows
Joule Business AI Solutions.description: Joule brings assistants and agents together in a unified workspace that turns intent into autonomous action—running end-to-end workflows across your business.

SAP Business AI Platform.name: SAP Business AI Platform
SAP Business AI Platform.tagline: SAP Business AI Platform combines deep process context, unified data, and purpose-built models with enterprise governance, so you can build and integrate AI that understands your business—not just your prompts.
capabilities: An enterprise AI platform built for your business
SAP Business AI Platform.description: SAP Business AI Platform combines deep process context, unified data, and purpose-built models with enterprise governance, so you can build and integrate AI that understands your business—not just your prompts.

SAP Sustainability.name: SAP Sustainability
SAP Sustainability.tagline: SAP enables companies become more sustainable by providing sustainability solutions and services that help them overcome sustainability challenges and identify new opportunities.
